chunks.text: Information for Current Graduate Students - EECS at Berkeley Information for Current Graduate Students Information For Current Graduate Students Whether you’re pursuing a Ph.D., M.S., or M.Eng. degree in EECS, this page serves as your hub for essential academic resources, advising contacts, and connect with your program advisor for personalized support throughout your graduate journey.
